steps.action: Fetch data file via curl to count directions
steps.expected: 8-10 directions with name, heat, confidence, judgment, opportunity, risk fields
steps.observed: 9 directions found, each with all required fields (name, heat_magnitude, confidence_level, judgment_state, opportunity, risk, heat)

steps.action: Navigate to direction-map.html and take full-page screenshot
steps.expected: All 9 directions visible on bubble matrix
steps.observed: All 9 directions visible as bubbles: 18K 金镶翡翠, 多巴胺色系耳饰, 沉香 + 翡翠叠戴, 冰感小件吊坠, 满绿翡翠古法金搭配, 蓝水翡翠简约设计, 翡翠珍珠混搭, 翡翠戒面改制耳钉, 墨翠雕刻件

steps.action: Take accessibility snapshot to verify direction names and metrics
steps.expected: All direction names present; judgment state indicated via color; strategic position via x/y placement
steps.observed: All 9 direction names confirmed in snapshot img text. Color coding matches judgment states (green=值得跟, blue=观察中, orange=短热噪音, gray=需要补证据). Position on axes reflects opportunity (x) and risk (y). Bubble size varies with heat values.

VAL-MAP-002.notes: All 9 directions from the data file are represented on the bubble matrix. Each exposes: name (text label), heat/magnitude (bubble size), judgment state (color-coded per legend), and strategic position (x=机会, y=风险 axes). Confidence level is not displayed as a direct text label on each bubble but is part of the underlying data driving the visualization.

steps.observed: y-axis labeled '风险 ↑' (appears as '← 风险' in snapshot) with scale 0-100

steps.action: Verify bubble sizes vary by heat
steps.expected: Bubble sizes reflect 热度 / discussion intensity
steps.observed: Bubble sizes visibly vary. Largest bubbles correspond to 18K 金镶翡翠 (heat=92) and 满绿翡翠古法金搭配 (heat=84). Smallest correspond to 翡翠戒面改制耳钉 (heat=48) and 翡翠珍珠混搭 (heat=54).

steps.action: Verify strategic comparison at a glance
steps.expected: Users can visually compare strategic position
steps.observed: Chart clearly shows directions spread across opportunity/risk space. Description text reads: '横轴代表机会值（0-100），纵轴代表风险值（0-100），气泡大小代表热度。点击任何气泡查看该方向详情。'

VAL-MAP-003.notes: The direction map is a proper bubble-matrix view with x-axis = 机会 (0-100), y-axis = 风险 (0-100), and bubble size reflecting 热度. The layout enables at-a-glance strategic comparison. Section title is '机会 × 风险 战略矩阵'.

steps.observed: Page displays '9 追踪方向总数'
9 bubbles visible on bubble matrix, matching all 9 directions from data file (confirmed via accessibility snapshot showing all 9 names in the chart element)

VAL-MAP-005.notes: The direction map displays all 9 tracked directions (within the required 8-10 range), not a narrow featured subset. All directions from the data file are represented.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-MAP-002 confirmed all 9 directions displayed with key metrics (name, heat-sized bubbles, judgment color-coding, strategic position). VAL-MAP-003 confirmed bubble-matrix layout with 机会 x-axis, 风险 y-axis, and heat-sized bubbles. VAL-MAP-005 confirmed 9 tracked directions displayed (within 8-10 range). No JS console errors detected.
